sqlMap.select: /*DialogPledgeInfo.selectDialogManageUser*/ SELECT A.LOGIN_ID FROM TB_USER A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.LOGIN_ID = #loginId# AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
sqlMap.insert: /*DialogPledgeInfo.insertPledgeInfo*/ INSERT INTO TB_PLEDGEINFO( PLEDGE_INFO_ID , PLEDGE_INFO_NM , PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD , PLEDGE_END_YMD , DEL_YN , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE) VALUES (#pledgeInfoId# , #pledgeInfoNm# , #pledgeBeginYmd# , #pledgeEndYmd# , NVL(#delYn#, 'N') , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP)
sqlMap.update: /*DialogPledgeInfo.updatePledgeInfo*/ UPDATE TB_PLEDGEINFO SET PLEDGE_INFO_NM = #pledgeInfoNm# , PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD = #pledgeBeginYmd# , PLEDGE_END_YMD = #pledgeEndYmd# , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND PLEDGE_INFO_ID = #pledgeInfoId#
